# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

admin_listen: 0.0.0.0:8444 ssl cert=/path/to/admin.crt key=/path/to/admin.key
proxy_listen: 0.0.0.0:8000, 0.0.0.0:8443 ssl cert=/path/to/proxy.crt key=/path/to/proxy.key

database = postgres
pg_host = "your_database_host"
pg_port = 5432
pg_user = "your_database_user"
pg_password = "your_database_password"
pg_database = "kong"

admin_gui_listen: 0.0.0.0:8001 ssl cert=/path/to/admin-gui.crt key=/path/to/admin-gui.key

nginx_worker_processes = auto
nginx_daemon = off

# Additional configuration options can be added here
